d536a2fe-b460-4928-a7db-aba81cecf071.label: Lei Liang – Six Seasons x Marco Fusi

children.text: (2022) features hydrophone recordings of Arctic ice and marine life integrated with a string quartet, treating environmental sound as an ensemble member rather than a backdrop. “Season” here is defined by environmental change rather than calendar time.

label: Lei Liang – Six Seasons x Marco Fusi
